pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly uses this ID to create the inventory item in CouchDB.
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this vendor.
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this quantity to be added.
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this cost.
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this lot number.
task.json description and verifier.py logic explicitly require this invoice number.
setup_task.sh seeds the item with quantity 200.
Mathematically derived (initial 200 + added 500) and strictly checked in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task is synthetic, with the inventory item 'inventory_p1_GLVLG001' seeded in CouchDB with an initial quantity of 200 via setup_task.sh. The task description specifies a purchase of 500 items from 'MedLine Industries' at cost 625, lot 'LOT-2024-0847', and invoice 'INV-ML-20241115'. The verifier strictly enforces these values and expects the final quantity to be exactly 700.
